name: notre dame; björn andrésen
description:
DEAR LORD, WHEN I GET TO HEAVEN.
—
"i love you."
he said to God, said to the saints, to all he knew in life.
sometimes a bubbling curiosity grows,
he wants to hear the three words spoken to him.

ೋღೋ

Notre Dame, beauty within each chamber of it’s magnificent chapel heart. A testament to--and proof--of the French Gothic architecture that upholds the dignity, strength, and love their God has. But man is too weak, too vulgar, to ever notice and look below their glasses of deviant power.

The odd number will forever be plucked and separated from the rest in the name of God.
Adultery, pride, alcohol.

Blasphemy.

ೋღೋ

Björn is the son of the Archdeacon, a confused saint with golden curls and questioning manners that makes the society around him either adore or loath.
You could never blame him for his beauty, can you?
